final:
// // This module decrements its count value on each rising edge of the clock signal and resets to maximum when the reset signal is asserted.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if(reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements its count value on each rising edge of the clock signal and resets to maximum when the reset signal is asserted.
